prompt: Validate this pipeline and fix it so it's valid, then confirm it's valid. Pipeline: {"components":[{"id":"chat_1","provider":"chat","config":{"hideForm":true,"mode":"Source","parameters":{},"type":"chat"}},{"id":"llm_1","provider":"llm_openai","config":{"profile":"openai-4o","openai-4o":{"apikey":"${ROCKETRIDE_OPENAI_KEY}"}},"input":[{"lane":"text","from":"chat_1"}]},{"id":"response_1","provider":"response_answers","config":{"laneName":"answers"},"input":[{"lane":"answers","from":"llm_1"}]}],"project_id":"a7f3c2e1-9b4d-4a8e-b1c5-7d6e9f2a8b3c","viewport":{"x":0,"y":0,"zoom":1},"version":1}
why: The pipeline has a lane mismatch (chat outputs 'questions', not 'text', into the LLM). The agent must validate (catch it), fix the lane to 'questions', and RE-validate — not claim valid after a text-only fix. Tests the re-validation loop.
rubric: validates and catches the lane mismatch (text vs questions)
fixes the edge to the 'questions' lane
re-validates after the fix (does not claim valid without a clean result)
